title: RA.104 Quiet Village
tracklist: 01 Quiet Village - Victoria's Secret - !K7 02 Rhythm & Sound - Jah Version - Burial Mix 03 Jackie Mittoo - After Xmas - Soul Jazz 04 Warp 69 - Natural High (Global Communication remix) - Dedicated 05 Led Zeppelin - Babe I'm Gonna Leave You - Atlantic Records 06 Stelvio Cipriani - Main Theme from Blindman - Digitmovies 07 Quiet Village - Gold Rush - !K7 08 Sergio Mendes - Crystal Illusions - A&M 09 Celestine Okwu - Okwukwe Na Nchekwube - Soundway 10 US69 - On My Way - Buddah

translation.content: Joel Martin and Matt "Radio Slave" Edwards are the two men that make up Quiet Village, but it might be more accurate to say that the records that Martin and Edwards own are Quiet Village. Silent Movie, their debut full-length, is about as sample-heavy as any hip-hop offering, utilizing obscure and not-so-obscure sources to create up 21st century update on loungey exotica. Martin and Edwards aren't so much beat merchants, though, as much as they're interested in vibes. Silent Movie is a voyage into Balearic territory, where '50s eccentricity sits alongside the Chi-Lites and dub matches well with Italian film soundtracks. The same can be said for the duo's RA podcast. An hour-long home-listening mix, the duo floats along with some of their favourite records in tow, including a healthy dose of dub (Rhythm & Sound, Jackie Mittoo), ambient, downtempo and even a little bit of Led Zeppelin. Turn off the lights, sit back and drift away.
translation.blurb: Musical holidaymakers Quiet Village take a psychedelic voyage on RA.104.
